name: Graph-Based Agentic AI with LangGraph: Workflow Pathways for Long-Running Stateful Business Processes
summary: arXiv:2607.19297v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper is a practitioner guide to graph-based workflow pathways for long-running, stateful, multi-step generative AI systems in business processe...
description: arXiv:2607.19297v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper is a practitioner guide to graph-based workflow pathways for long-running, stateful, multi-step generative AI systems in business processes. Rather than treating LangGraph, a low-level orchestration framework for stateful agents, as a model-quality benchmark target, we present three executable recipes -- SQL analytics with repair loops,...
author: Daniel Pearson, Sidney Shapiro, Emiliano Sebastian Gonzalez Venegas, Sanad Al-Khatib, Aurora Pinz\'on Arzola
